evidences.content: Converter supports daylight saving time (DST) or summer time, if the target location is currently using DST time zone, converter will automatically calculate and display local summer time. [...] Based International Air Transport Association (IATA) timezone codes. Time zones use hours and minutes offset from Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), most a whole number of hours, a few are offset by 30 or 45 minutes. Eastern Standard Time (EST) is UTC-5:00, and Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) is UTC-4:00, this time zone is called Eastern Time Zone (ET) in the United States, parts of eastern Canada, Mexico, Panama and the Caribbean Islands. Coordinated Universal Time (UTC) is the primary time standard now, time zones around the world are expressed using offsets from UTC, UTC offset is the difference in hours and minutes from UTC, a time zone can be determined by adding or subtracting the number of UTC offset. evidences.content: Binance Logo Binance Logo # Kline/Candlestick Data ## API Description​ Kline/candlestick bars for an option symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time. ## HTTP Request​ GET `/eapi/v1/klines` `/eapi/v1/klines` ## Request Weight​ 1 ## Request Parameters​ | Name | Type | Mandatory | Description | --- --- | | symbol | STRING | YES | Option trading pair, e.g BTC-200730-9000-C | | interval | STRING | YES | Time interval | | startTime | LONG | NO | Start Time 1592317127349 | | endTime | LONG | NO | End Time | | limit | INT | NO | Number of records Default:500 Max:1500 | ## Response Example​ [...] ## Response Example​ `[ [ 1762779600000, // Open time "1300.000", // Open "1300.000", // High "1300.000", // Low "1300.000", // Close "0.1000", // Volume 1762780499999, // Close time "130.0000000", // Quote asset volume 1, // Number of trades "0.1000", // Taker buy base asset volume "130.0000000", // Taker buy quote asset volume "0" // Ignore. ], ]`

evidences.content: `symbol` and `limit` are straightforward, `startTime` and `endTime` we now have covered by the above `date_to_milliseconds` function. We note from this that we can get a maximum of 500 results each request, so we will need to build a loop if we are fetching over a long time period. `interval` we have a list of so these are passed easily. The get\_klines endpoint returns an array of klines in this order ``` [1499040000000, # Open time "0.01634790", # Open "0.80000000", # High "0.01575800", # Low "0.01577100", # Close "148976.11427815", # Volume 1499644799999, # Close time "2434.19055334", # Quote asset volume 308, # Number of trades "1756.87402397", # Taker buy base asset volume "28.46694368", # Taker buy quote asset volume "17928899.62484339" # Ignore ] ``` [...] First install the `dateparser` package ``` install ``` Now we can create a function to take a readable string into milliseconds. With this function we can convert all sorts of handy date formats to milliseconds like the examples below. ``` print(date_to_milliseconds("January 01, 2018")) print(date_to_milliseconds("11 hours ago UTC")) print(date_to_milliseconds("now UTC")) ``` ### Binance Kline endpoint Now we have that...

evidences.title: Binance.US API Documentation
evidences.content: + Previously some requests failed if the `startTime` == `endTime`. + Now, all API requests that accept `startTime` and `endTime` allow the parameters to be equal. This applies to the following requests: - `GET /api/v3/aggTrades` - `GET /api/v3/klines` - `GET /api/v3/allOrderList` - `GET /api/v3/allOrders` - `GET /api/v3/myTrades` Changes to Filter Evaluation: + Previous behavior: `LOT_SIZE` and `MARKET_LOT_SIZE` required that (`quantity` - `minQty`) % `stepSize` == 0. + New behavior changed to: (`quantity` % `stepSize`) == 0. Bug fix with reverse `MARKET` orders (i.e. `MARKET` using `quoteOrderQty`): [...] Data Source: Memory ### Get Candlestick Data > Example ``` -X "GET"" ``` ``` import requests resp = requests. get(' print(resp. json()) ``` > Response ``` ``` `GET /api/v3/klines` Use this endpoint to get Kline/candlestick bars for a token symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time. Please note the maximum limit is 1,000 bars. Weight: 1 Parameters: | Name | Type | Mandatory | Description | --- --- | | symbol | STRING | YES | | interval | ENUM | YES | | startTime | LONG | NO | | endTime | LONG | NO | | limit | INT | NO | Default 500; max 1000 | If startTime and e...

evidences.title: Kline Candlestick Data | Binance Open Platform
evidences.content: Binance Logo Binance Logo # Kline/Candlestick Data ## API Description​ Kline/candlestick bars for a symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time. Kline/Candlestick chart intervals: m -> minutes; h -> hours; d -> days; w -> weeks; M -> months ## HTTP Request​ GET `/dapi/v1/klines` `/dapi/v1/klines` ## Request Weight​ based on parameter `LIMIT` `LIMIT` | LIMIT | weight | --- | | [1,100) | 1 | | [100, 500) | 2 | | [500, 1000] | 5 | 1000 | 10 ## Request Parameters​ | Name | Type | Mandatory | Description | --- --- | | symbol | STRING | YES | | | interval | ENUM | YES | | | startTime | LONG | NO | | | endTime | LONG | NO | | | limit | INT | NO | Default 500; max 1500. | [...] `startTime` `endTime` `startTime` `endTime` `limit` `endTime` `startTime` `endTime` `endTime` `startTime` `startTime` `endTime` `endTime` `endTime` `startTime` ## Response Example​ `[ [ 1591258320000, // Open time "9640.7", // Open "9642.4", // High "9640.6", // Low "9642.0", // Close (or latest price) "206", // Volume 1591258379999, // Close time "2.13660389", // Base asset volume 48, // Number of trades "119", // Taker buy volume "1.23424865", // Taker buy base asset volume "0" // Ignore. ] ]`
evidences.query: Binance API klines BTCUSDT 1m historical startTime endTime

evidences.title: EST to UTC Converter - World Time Buddy
evidences.content: Privacy • Terms of Service [...] | | | | --- | Converting EST to UTC This time zone converter lets you visually and very quickly convert EST to UTC and vice-versa. Simply mouse over the colored hour-tiles and glance at the hours selected by the column... and done! EST stands for Eastern Standard Time. UTC is known as Universal Time. UTC is 4 hours ahead of EST. So, when it is it will be Other conversions: EST to Hong Kong Time, EST to Melbourne Time, EST to Copenhagen Time, EST to Austin Time | | Getting Started 1 Add locations (or remove, set home, order) 2 Mouse over hours to convert time at a glance 3 Click hour tiles to schedule and share + Sign in to save settings - it's FREE! | © 2011-26 Helloka, LLC • worldtimebuddy.com • About • Feedback • Mobile App • Annoucements [...] # EST to UTC Converter World Clock & Time Converter Features Widgets World Clock WidgetEvent Widget Mobile App Sign In Sign in with FacebookSign in with Email am pm Link to this view Settings Show Timezones Mark Weekends Calendars...
